---
title: "Which Hitting Metrics Predict Success?"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme:
      version: 4
      bootswatch: darkly
date: "2026-04-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(RColorBrewer)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
stats = read.csv("stats (1).csv")
stats = stats %>% rename(name = last_name..first_name, avg = batting_avg, slg = slg_percent, ops = on_base_plus_slg)
stats = stats %>% rename (GB_percent = groundballs_percent, FB_percent = flyballs_percent, LD_percent = linedrives_percent, oppo_percent = opposite_percent, iso = isolated_power, swing_speed = avg_swing_speed, exit_velo = exit_velocity_avg, barrel_rate = barrel_batted_rate)
stats = stats %>% 
  mutate(
    avg          = as.numeric(avg),
    slg          = as.numeric(slg),
    ops          = as.numeric(ops),
    iso          = as.numeric(iso),
    xba          = as.numeric(xba),
    xslg         = as.numeric(xslg),
    woba         = as.numeric(woba),
    xwoba        = as.numeric(xwoba),
    sprint_speed = as.numeric(sprint_speed),
    swing_speed  = as.numeric(swing_speed),
    # Luck gap: positive = outperforming expectations
    luck_gap   = round(woba - xwoba, 3),
    luck_label = case_when(
      luck_gap >  0.020 ~ "Overperformer",
      luck_gap < -0.020 ~ "Underperformer",
      TRUE              ~ "On Track"
    ),
    # Swing speed bins
    speed_bin = cut(
      swing_speed,
      breaks = c(-Inf, 68, 71, 74, 77, Inf),
      labels = c("< 68", "68–71", "71–74", "74–77", "77+")
    ),
    # Dominant batted ball profile per player
    bb_profile = case_when(
      LD_percent >= FB_percent & LD_percent >= GB_percent ~ "Line Drive Heavy",
      FB_percent >= LD_percent & FB_percent >= GB_percent ~ "Fly Ball Heavy",
      TRUE                                                ~ "Ground Ball Heavy"
    )
  )
```

Row {data-height=100}
-------------------------------------

### League Average OPS {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(
  value    = round(mean(stats$ops), 3),
  caption  = "League Average OPS",
  icon     = "fa-baseball",
  color    = "#1a6b3a"
)
```

### League Average wOBA {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(
  value    = round(mean(stats$woba), 3),
  caption  = "League Average wOBA",
  icon     = "fa-baseball-bat-ball",
  color    = "#1a6b3a"
)
```

### League average Swing Speed {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(
  value    = round(mean(stats$swing_speed), 1),
  caption  = "League Average Swing Speed",
  icon     = "fa-baseball",
  color    = "#1a6b3a"
)
```

### League average Whiff Rate {.value-box}
```{r}
valueBox(
  value    = round(mean(stats$whiff_percent), 1),
  caption  = "League Average Whiff Rate",
  icon     = "fa-baseball-bat-ball",
  color    = "#1a6b3a"
)
```
Row {data-height=450}
-------------------------------------

### OPS and wOBA's nearly perfect relationship
```{r}
plot_ly(
  data      = stats,
  x         = ~woba,
  y         = ~ops,
  type      = "scatter",
  mode      = "markers",
  hovertext = ~paste0(
    "<b>", name, "</b><br>",
    "OPS: ",  ops,  "<br>",
    "wOBA: ", woba
  ),
  hoverinfo = "text",
  marker    = list(
    color   = "steelblue",
    size    = 8,
    opacity = 0.7,
    line    = list(width = 0.5, color = "black")
  )
) %>%
  layout(
    # title = list(text = "OPS vs wOBA", font  = list(color = "black", size = 16)),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font  = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    xaxis = list(
      title     = "wOBA",
      gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      color     = "#e0e0e0",
      showline  = TRUE,
      linecolor = "#e0e0e0"
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title     = "OPS",
      gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      color     = "#e0e0e0",
      showline  = TRUE,
      linecolor = "#e0e0e0"
    ),
    margin = list(t = 20)
  )
```

### Swing Speed's effect on OPS (Colored by Whiff rate)
```{r}
bin_summary <- stats %>%
  filter(!is.na(speed_bin), !is.na(ops)) %>%
  group_by(speed_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_ops   = round(mean(ops,             na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    avg_slg   = round(mean(slg,             na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    avg_avg   = round(mean(avg,             na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    avg_woba  = round(mean(woba,            na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    avg_k     = round(mean(k_percent,       na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    avg_bb    = round(mean(bb_percent,      na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    avg_oz    = round(mean(oz_swing_percent, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    avg_whiff = round(mean(whiff_percent,   na.rm = TRUE), 1), 
    n_players = n(),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

fig <- plot_ly(
  bin_summary,
  x            = ~speed_bin,
  y            = ~avg_ops,
  type         = "bar",
  texttemplate = "",
  hovertext    = ~paste0(
    "<b>Swing Speed: ", speed_bin, " mph</b><br>",
    "Avg OPS: <b>",    avg_ops,      "</b><br>",
    "Avg Whiff%: ",     avg_whiff,    "<br>",
    # "Avg wOBA: ",      avg_woba,     "<br>",
    # "Avg AVG: ",       avg_avg,      "<br>",
    "Avg K%: ",        avg_k,        "<br>",
    # "Avg BB%: ",       avg_bb,       "<br>",
    "Avg SLG: ",       avg_slg,      "<br>",
    # "Avg OZ Swing%: ", avg_oz,       "<br>",
    "Players in bin: ", n_players
  ),
  hoverinfo = "text",
  marker = list(
    color = ~avg_whiff,
    colorscale = list(
      c(0,   "#1a4480"),
      # c(0, "blue"),
      c(0.5, "#5bba6f"),
      c(1,   "#f5c518")
      # c(1, "red")
    ),
    # color = c("#2c7bb6", "#74add1", "#abd9e9", "#fdae61", "#d7191c"),
    showscale = TRUE,
    colorbar  = list(
      title     = "Avg Whiff%",
      tickfont  = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
      titlefont = list(color = "#e0e0e0")
    ),
    line = list(width = 0.5, color = "#222")
  )
) %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font  = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    xaxis = list(
      title     = "Avg Swing Speed (mph)",
      gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      color     = "#e0e0e0",
      showline  = TRUE,
      linecolor = "#e0e0e0"
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title     = "Average OPS",
      gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      range     = c(0.65, 0.87),
      color     = "#e0e0e0",
      showline  = TRUE,
      linecolor = "#e0e0e0"
    ),
    margin = list(t = 20)
  )

fig
```

Row {data-height=450}
-------------------------------------

### OPS by the rates of different Batted Ball Types
```{r}
compute_loess <- function(x_col, y_col, df, span = 0.6) {
  d <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x_col]]), !is.na(.data[[y_col]])) %>%
    arrange(.data[[x_col]])
  fit    <- loess(as.formula(paste(y_col, "~", x_col)), data = d, span = span)
  x_seq  <- seq(min(d[[x_col]]), max(d[[x_col]]), length.out = 100)
  fit_se <- predict(fit, newdata = setNames(data.frame(x_seq), x_col), se = TRUE)
  data.frame(
    x    = x_seq,
    y    = fit_se$fit,
    y_lo = fit_se$fit - 1.96 * fit_se$se.fit,
    y_hi = fit_se$fit + 1.96 * fit_se$se.fit
  )
}

ld_smooth <- compute_loess("LD_percent", "ops", stats)
fb_smooth <- compute_loess("FB_percent", "ops", stats)
gb_smooth <- compute_loess("GB_percent", "ops", stats)

col_ld <- "#f5c518"
col_fb <- "#5b9bd5"
col_gb <- "#cc4444"

fig_bb <- plot_ly()

# ── Line Drive line ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_bb <- fig_bb %>%
  add_trace(
    x         = ld_smooth$x,
    y         = ld_smooth$y,
    type      = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line      = list(color = col_ld, width = 3),
    name      = "Line Drive %",
    visible   = TRUE,
    hovertext = paste0("LD%: ", round(ld_smooth$x, 1),
                       "<br>Smoothed OPS: ", round(ld_smooth$y, 3)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  )

# ── Fly Ball line ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_bb <- fig_bb %>%
  add_trace(
    x         = fb_smooth$x,
    y         = fb_smooth$y,
    type      = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line      = list(color = col_fb, width = 3),
    name      = "Fly Ball %",
    visible   = FALSE,
    hovertext = paste0("FB%: ", round(fb_smooth$x, 1),
                       "<br>Smoothed OPS: ", round(fb_smooth$y, 3)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  )

# ── Ground Ball line ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_bb <- fig_bb %>%
  add_trace(
    x         = gb_smooth$x,
    y         = gb_smooth$y,
    type      = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line      = list(color = col_gb, width = 3),
    name      = "Ground Ball %",
    visible   = FALSE,
    hovertext = paste0("GB%: ", round(gb_smooth$x, 1),
                       "<br>Smoothed OPS: ", round(gb_smooth$y, 3)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  )

# Trace order: LD line, FB line, GB line
# Indices:         1       2       3

btns <- list(
  list(
    method = "update", label = "Line Drive %",
    args   = list(list(visible = c(TRUE,  FALSE, FALSE)),
                  list(xaxis   = list(title = "Line Drive %", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                                      zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0", 
                                      showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0")))
  ),
  list(
    method = "update", label = "Fly Ball %",
    args   = list(list(visible = c(FALSE, TRUE,  FALSE)),
                  list(xaxis   = list(title = "Fly Ball %", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                                      zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0",
                                      showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0")))
  ),
  list(
    method = "update", label = "Ground Ball %",
    args   = list(list(visible = c(FALSE, FALSE, TRUE)),
                  list(xaxis   = list(title = "Ground Ball %", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                                      zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0", 
                                      showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0")))
  ), 
  list(
    method = "update", label = "All batted ball types",
    args   = list(list(visible = c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE)),
                  list(xaxis   = list(title = "Batted Ball Type %", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                                      zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0",
                                      showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0")))
  )
)

fig_bb %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font     = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    xaxis    = list(title = "Line Drive %", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                    zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0", 
                    showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0"),
    yaxis    = list(title = "OPS", gridcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
                    zeroline = FALSE, color = "#e0e0e0", range = c(0.5, 1.2), # rangemode = tozero,
                    showline = TRUE, linecolor = "#e0e0e0"),
    legend   = list(font = list(size = 11)),
    margin   = list(t = 70),
    updatemenus = list(list(
      type       = "buttons",
      direction  = "right",
      showactive = TRUE,
      x          = 0, xanchor = "left",
      y          = 1.15, yanchor = "top",
      buttons    = btns,
      bgcolor    = "#eeeeee",
      font       = list(color = "black")
    ))# ,
    # annotations = list(list(
    #   # text      = "Batted Ball Type:",
    #   x = 0, xref = "paper", xanchor = "left",
    #   y = 1.22, yref = "paper", yanchor = "top",
    #   showarrow = FALSE,
    #   font      = list(color = "black", size = 12)
    # ))
  )
```


### Average Exit Velocity vs OPS (bubble size = whiff rate) (filtered by max pull %)
```{r}
pull_thresholds <- seq(30, 55, by = 5)

fig_bubble <- plot_ly()

for (p in pull_thresholds) {
  d <- stats %>%
    filter(!is.na(exit_velo), !is.na(ops), !is.na(whiff_percent)) %>%
    filter(pull_percent <= p)
  
  # Scatter trace
  fig_bubble <- fig_bubble %>%
    add_trace(
      data       = d,
      x          = ~exit_velo,
      y          = ~ops,
      size       = ~whiff_percent,
      type       = "scatter",
      mode       = "markers",
      sizes      = c(5, 50),
      visible    = (p == max(pull_thresholds)),
      showlegend = FALSE,
      marker     = list(
        color = "steelblue",
        opacity = 0.7,
        line    = list(width = 0.5, color = "black")
      ),
      hovertext = ~paste0(
        "<b>", name, "</b><br>",
        "Exit Velocity: ", exit_velo,    " mph<br>",
        "OPS: ",           ops,           "<br>",
        "Whiff%: ",        whiff_percent, "%<br>",
        "Pull%: ",         pull_percent,  "%<br>"
        # "GB%: ",           GB_percent,    "%<br>",
        # "AVG: ",           avg
      ),
      hoverinfo = "text"
    )
  
  fit   <- lm(ops ~ exit_velo, data = d)
  x_seq <- seq(min(d$exit_velo, na.rm = TRUE), max(d$exit_velo, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100)
  y_seq <- predict(fit, newdata = data.frame(exit_velo = x_seq))

  fig_bubble <- fig_bubble %>%
    add_trace(
      x         = x_seq,
      y         = y_seq,
      type      = "scatter",
      mode      = "lines",
      visible   = (p == max(pull_thresholds)),
      showlegend= FALSE,
      hoverinfo = "skip",
      line      = list(color = "#ff6b6b", width = 2, dash = "dash")
  )
}

n_pull   <- length(pull_thresholds)
n_legend <- 3
# Now 2 traces per threshold (scatter + trendline)

steps <- lapply(seq_along(pull_thresholds), function(i) {
  vis <- c(rep(FALSE, n_pull * 2), rep(TRUE, n_legend))
  vis[(i - 1) * 2 + 1] <- TRUE   # scatter trace
  vis[(i - 1) * 2 + 2] <- TRUE   # trendline trace
  list(
    method = "update",
    label  = as.character(pull_thresholds[i]),
    args   = list(list(visible = vis))
  )
})

fig_bubble %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font  = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    xaxis = list(title = "Average Exit Velocity (mph)", showline = TRUE, linecolor="#e0e0e0",
                 gridcolor = "#333", zeroline = FALSE, showgrid=FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "OPS",  showline = TRUE, linecolor="#e0e0e0",
                 gridcolor = "#333", zeroline = FALSE, showgrid = FALSE),
    legend = list(
      title = list(text = "<b>Whiff %</b>"),
      font  = list(color = "#e0e0e0")
    ),
    margin = list(t = 30, b = 80),
    sliders = list(list(
      active       = length(pull_thresholds) - 1,
      currentvalue = list(
        prefix = "Max Pull%: ",
        font   = list(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 13)
      ),
      steps       = steps,
      x           = 0,
      xanchor     = "left",
      y           = -0.15,
      yanchor     = "top",
      bgcolor     = "#333",
      bordercolor = "#888",
      font        = list(color = "#e0e0e0")
    ))
  )
```

Row {data-height=450}
-------------------------------------

### Expected vs Actual wOBA
```{r}
stats_luck <- stats %>% filter(!is.na(xwoba), !is.na(woba))

diag_min <- min(c(stats_luck$xwoba, stats_luck$woba), na.rm = TRUE) - 0.005
diag_max <- max(c(stats_luck$xwoba, stats_luck$woba), na.rm = TRUE) + 0.005

luck_colors <- c(
  "Overperformer"  = "#f5c518",
  "On Track"       = "#5b9bd5",
  "Underperformer" = "#cc4444"
)

plot_ly() %>%
  add_trace(
    x         = c(diag_min, diag_max),
    y         = c(diag_min, diag_max),
    type      = "scatter",
    mode      = "lines",
    line      = list(color = "#666", width = 1.5, dash = "dot"),
    name      = "Expected = Actual",
    hoverinfo = "skip",
    showlegend = TRUE
  ) %>%
  add_trace(
    data      = stats_luck,
    x         = ~xwoba,
    y         = ~woba,
    type      = "scatter",
    mode      = "markers",
    color     = ~luck_label,
    colors    = luck_colors,
    marker    = list(size = 9, opacity = 0.83,
                     line = list(width = 0.5, color = "#222")),
    text = ~paste0(
      "<b>", name, "</b><br>",
      "xwOBA: ", xwoba, "<br>",
      "wOBA:  ", woba,  "<br>",
      "Gap (actual − expected): ", luck_gap, "<br>",
      "Status: <b>", luck_label, "</b>"
    ),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font  = list(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    xaxis = list(title = "Expected wOBA (xwOBA)", gridcolor = "#333", zeroline = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(title = "Actual wOBA",           gridcolor = "#333", zeroline = FALSE),
    legend = list(
      title = list(text = "<b>vs. Expectation</b>"),
      font  = list(size = 11)
    ),
    margin = list(t = 20)
  )
```
